questions.question: India recently inaugurated the new Indian Embassy in which country (in August 2022)?
questions.explanation: India’s Union External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar jointly inaugurated the new Indian Embassy in Asuncion in Paraguay with his counterpart. This is the first ever visit of an Indian Foreign Minister to the Republic of Paraguay which has taken place as the two countries completed the 60th anniversary of the establishment of diplomatic relations.

questions.question: Asian Development Bank (ADB) has announced to provide USD 96.3-mn loan to improve water supply in which state?
questions.explanation: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) will provide a loan of USD 96.3 million (about Rs 769 crore) for a project to provide safe drinking water and improve water supply and sanitation services in Himachal Pradesh. The ADB project will connect over 75,000 households to the service, providing uninterrupted water supply across 10 districts.

questions.question: Which country marked the Ukraine’s Independence Day with USD 3 billion in security assistance?
questions.explanation: U.S. President Joe Biden marked Ukraine’s Independence Day with USD 3 billion in security assistance. This is the country’s largest aid package since Russia’s invasion six months ago. It is feared that Russia appeared to be planning to launch fresh attacks in coming days.The new package would include six additional surface-to-air missile systems known as NASAMS, counter-artillery radars, Puma drones, along with counter-drone systems known as VAMPIRE.

questions.question: What is ‘Azadi Quest’, which was launched recently by the Ministry of Information and Broadcasting?
questions.explanation: Union Minister of Information and Broadcasting, Anurag Singh Thakur launched ‘Azadi Quest’, a series of online educational mobile games, in Delhi. It aims to highlight the story of India’s freedom struggle. The games have been developed in collaboration with Zynga India, as part of the Azaadi ka Amrit Mahotsav celebrations. The first two games highlight milestones and heroes of the freedom struggle.

questions.question: Finance Ministry has made unauthorised publication of which data as compoundable offence?
questions.explanation: There Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) has recently announced ₹1 lakh penalty for the first offence under section 135AA of the Customs Act through Customs (Compounding of Offences) Amendment Rules, 2022 The section prohibits unauthorised publication of import-export data. In Budget 2022-23, Finance section 135AA was inserted to protect the import and export data submitted to Customs by importers or exporters.

questions.question: Union Health Ministry has partnered with which General Insurance company to help create Digital health Ids?
questions.explanation: Union Health Ministry has partnered with Edelweiss General Insurance to help create digital health IDs for all in the country. ‘ABHA’ or the Ayushman Bharat Health Account is a 14-digit number that helps users to share and access their health records digitally with registered healthcare providers. National Health Authority (NHA) is the apex body responsible for implementing this program under the Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission.

questions.question: ‘Veer Balak Memorial’ and ‘Smruti Van’ have been inaugurated in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Prime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated the ‘Veer Balak Memorial’ in Anjar town of Kutch in the state of Gujarat. It was opened in the memory of 185 school children and 20 teachers who were buried during the incident during the 2001 earthquake happened in Gujarat. He also inaugurated India’s first earthquake memorial ‘Smruti Van’ to commemorate more than 12,000 people who lost their lives in the 2001 earthquake.

questions.question: Which racing driver clinched the ‘Formula One Belgian Grand Prix’ title?
questions.explanation: Red Bull’s Dutch driver and reigning Formula One world champion Max Verstappen won the Belgian Grand Prix. He won the race despite starting the race from 14th place on the grid. Mexican racing driver Sergio Perez finished second while Carlos Sainz Jr, Spanish motorsports racing driver finished third.

questions.question: Which country has recently taken down a 260-foot tall Soviet-era monument?
questions.explanation: A concrete obelisk with Soviet stars at the top, commemorating the Red Army’s victory over Nazi Germany, was taken down in Latvia’s capital. The monument was built in 1985 while Latvia was still part of the Soviet Union. Russia’s invasion of Ukraine has urged authorities in several European countries to remove symbols from their communist eras.

questions.question: Aphrastura subantarctica, which was seen in the news, belongs to which species?
questions.explanation: The newly-identified bird species, named the subantarctic rayadito (Aphrastura subantarctica), which inhabits the Diego Ramírez Archipelago. The Diego Ramírez is the southernmost point of the South American continent. The bird moves at shorter distances from ground level, and it breeds in cavities in the ground, instead of nesting in cavities in trees.
